mapper.select: select aprvlineid, seq, stepname, approverid, approvername from cotdl.tbl_piiapprovaluser order by aprvlineid, seq
mapper.insert: insert into cotdl.tbl_piiapprovaluser (aprvlineid, seq, stepname, approverid, approvername) values (#{aprvlineid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{seq, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{stepname, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{approverid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{approvername, jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into cotdl.tbl_piiapprovaluser (aprvlineid, seq, stepname, approverid, approvername) values (#{aprvlineid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{seq, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{stepname, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{approverid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{approvername, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.select: select aprvlineid, seq, stepname, approverid, approvername from cotdl.tbl_piiapprovaluser where aprvlineid = #{aprvlineid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} order by aprvlineid, seq

select b.aprvlineid as str1, concat('[', b.aprvlineid, '] ', group_concat(concat('STEP' ,b.seq,'.',b.stepname,' : ','',b.approvername,' ') order by b.seq separator '> ')) as str2 from cotdl.tbl_piiapprovalline a, cotdl.tbl_piiapprovaluser b where a.aprvlineid = b.aprvlineid and a.approvalid = #{approvalid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} group by b.aprvlineid
mapper.delete: delete from cotdl.tbl_piiapprovaluser where aprvlineid= #{aprvlineid} and seq= #{seq}
delete from cotdl.tbl_piiapprovaluser where aprvlineid= #{aprvlineid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and seq= #{seq}
delete from cotdl.TBL_PIIAPPROVALUSER where aprvlineid = #{aprvlineid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select:
select aprvlineid, seq, stepname, approverid, approvername from cotdl.tbl_piiapprovaluser
order by aprvlineid, seq limit #{offset}, #{amount}
